kw.name: Run Keywords
Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

test.name: TC-TX-UI-05

kw.name: Open Application
Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/environment.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens the application

kw.name: Login
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Logs in to the parabank with the provided username and password

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="fromAccountId"]' by index 0.

NoSuchElementException: Message: Could not locate element with index 0; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.
kw.status: NoSuchElementException: Message: Could not locate element with index 0; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="fromAccountId"]' by index 0.

NoSuchElementException: Message: Could not locate element with index 0; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.
kw.status: NoSuchElementException: Message: Could not locate element with index 0; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="fromAccountId"]' by index 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@id="toAccountId"]' by index 0.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.doc: Verify UI Error Message for Transfer Amount Exceeding Available Balance
